cms.contentitemcommondata.ContentItemCommonDataVisualBuilderWidget:
{"editableAreas":[{"identifier":"InnerPage","sections":[{"identifier":"c2337389-ffa8-41b7-9b96-4071264992a1","type":"Goldfinch.ContentSection","properties":{"sectionID":"","sectionName":""},"zones":[{"identifier":"c04cfcd0-b885-4fe1-88b2-2c7d49097b6c","widgets":[{"identifier":"09fb35bf-849f-40e3-92cc-2d29c412adb4","type":"Kentico.Widget.RichText","variants":[{"identifier":"47384860-3df5-4a15-9e98-346d316540e1","properties":{"content":"

I work as a Principal Systems Developer at IDHL, a digital agency that specialises in building websites on Kentico (Xperience by Kentico and Kentico Xperience 13) and Umbraco CMS platforms.

I've been honoured with the Kentico MVP award consecutively since 2022, recognising my passion for their DXP and the assistance I've given members of the community.

I'm a certified developer and marketer for Xperience by Kentico and an active member of the Kentico open-source community. As a co-organiser of Kentico User Group UK I'm proud to help bring together users, developers, marketers, and agencies to share knowledge.

This blog runs on Xperience by Kentico — the latest cloud-native, flexible DXP, rewritten from the ground up on .NET Core. The source is public at github.com/liamgold/goldfinch.me.

"},"fieldIdentifiers":{"content":"153c7b29-0aff-4b22-bf9f-23cc50301c5a"}}]}]}],"fieldIdentifiers":{"sectionID":"f456edea-ca2c-4d58-83cb-18cc16f6066e","sectionName":"5f296a3a-3e08-470f-b8f6-65939af66701"}}]}]}
